messages.content:
Generate COMPLETE HTML. Body 393x852px centered bg #1A1221. Absolute positions.

TITLE: 0,0,393,88 bg #EC4F99 + scallop bottom 24px. Text y:70 Montserrat Black 18px white centered.
PORTRAITS: left 24,136 72x72 white circle. Right 297,136 72x72. Letters J/A 28px #EC4F99.
VS: 162,152 40px Montserrat 800 #EC4F99.
NAMES: Jason 96,188 Aiden 253,188 14px Bold white.
HP: left 24,216 163x24 rounded-full 2px white border gradient rgba(79,236,162,0.1) to #4FECA2 with 100% inside. Right 206,216 gradient to #EC4F99.
DIALOGUE: 141,256 228x64 white rounded-12 shadow with triangle above. Montserrat Bold 14px.
CIRCLE: 57,304 280x280 border-4 #EC4F99 rounded-full. Outer conic-gradient(from 90deg,#EC4F99,#F17BB3,#F6A7CC,#FAD3E6,#FFF). Inner 256x256 radial-gradient(white,#FFE0F8). Contains GAME RULE 20px and description 16px.
BUTTONS: CRITICAL STYLING - both identical candy buttons:
- 12,632 and 12,718 w:369 h:72
- border:2px solid #EC4F99 rounded-[24px]
- shadow:0 4px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.15)
- Base layer: absolute bg #EC4F99
- Glass layer: absolute bg rgba(255,255,255,0.3)
- Highlight band: top:2px h:20px bg rgba(255,255,255,0.3)
- Inner glow: inset shadow 0 0 4px 4px rgba(255,255,255,0.5)
- Text: Montserrat Black 18px white. START and UNLOCK S TIER 🌙 50

Fonts: Montserrat 700/800/900 + Patrick Hand. No JS. End with </html>. Output ONLY HTML.
